(In reply to Wolfram Schneider from comment #1)(In reply to Wolfram Schneider from comment #1)

Since it did not conform to portlint (1), the patch file is getting bigger with that fix.
Besides, I modified to prevent warning messages at build time, but because it is difficult to create a patch file for that, I rewrote it.
Close me if I have problems with my submitted patch file. :|
